raw_payload.roomDescription: This 484-square-foot, non-smoking room offers floor-to-ceiling city views.  It features two twin beds, a separate sitting area with a flat-screen LED TV and cable channels, free WiFi, a minibar (fees may apply), a coffee/tea maker, and free bottled water.  The private bathroom includes a deep soaking bathtub, a separate shower, and premium toiletries.  Amenities include premium bedding, a down duvet, a pillow menu, blackout drapes/curtains, turndown service, a safe, an iron/ironing board, air conditioning, and daily housekeeping.  A rollaway/extra bed and crib/infant bed are available upon request.  Connecting/adjoining rooms may be available.  Doorbell and phone notification are provided.

raw_payload.roomDescription: This modern, air-conditioned room offers partial views of the Burj Khalifa.  Amenities include a seating area with flat-screen TV, minibar, and tea/coffee maker. The marble bathroom has two sinks, a bath, a hairdryer, and Molton Brown toiletries.

name: CLUB, KING BED, BURJ KHALIFA VIEW

raw_payload.name: CLUB, KING BED, BURJ KHALIFA VIEW
raw_payload.roomDescription: This 484 sq ft Club Level room offers partial views of the Burj Khalifa.  It features a king bed, a separate seating area with a flat-screen LED TV, a minibar, and a tea/coffee maker. The marble bathroom includes two sinks, a deep soaking bathtub, and a hairdryer, stocked with Molton Brown toiletries.  Amenities include Executive Lounge access with complimentary cocktails (6:00 pm - 8:00 pm), buffet breakfast, light refreshments, and internet access.  Guests also receive complimentary use of the steam room and sauna, and access to a private meeting room for two hours (subject to availability).  Free WiFi, premium bedding, a down duvet, a pillow menu, blackout drapes, turndown service, a safe, free newspaper, an iron/ironing board, and daily housekeeping are also provided.  Air conditioning and doorbell/phone notification are available.  Connecting rooms may be requested.  Note:  Extra beds are not accommodated.
